---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you running into? (e.g. "I always have to re-open the same database on every launch")

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? Be as specific or as vague as you like — we'll figure out the details together.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about or currently use as a workaround.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools — anything that helps.
